ideas.title: day_length_delta() pure fn — 'today is N min shorter/longer than yesterday'
ideas.why: coverage_fns=9 are all astronomy math and wx.json already carries sunrise/sunset, so a sunrise/sunset→delta fn is a natural fully-testable extension of the 100%-gated crate.

ideas.title: wind_compass() fn: degrees → 16-point bearing + arrow glyph
ideas.why: wx.json already proxies current_condition (incl. wind degrees) yet the UI shows no direction, so a pure degrees→compass mapping is a self-contained testable add like the existing astronomy fns.

ideas.title: Respect prefers-reduced-motion on the SunArc animation
ideas.why: SunArc renders a moving sun/arc with no reduced-motion guard, an accessibility gap fixable with a pure CSS media query.

ideas.title: wx_stale() fn + visible 'as of HH:MM' / stale badge on WeatherCard
ideas.why: the wx.json fix is fail-open (keeps last-good silently), so a pure staleness check off the fetch timestamp surfaces a stuck proxy that currently reads as fresh weather.

ideas.title: gen_wttr.py: add retry+backoff and on-failure keep last-good wx.json
ideas.why: the summary NOTE flags wttr.in per-IP flakiness and wx.json is now the SOLE weather source for all 3 consumers, so a single failed deploy fetch degrades weather/sky/sun at once.

ideas.title: Factory-tab router offload panel (spark vs cloud ratio + savings)
ideas.why: router shows spark=42/cloud_hard=34/spark_today=13 but the ~/factory tab doesn't surface the local-vs-cloud split, hiding the cost win the two idle GB10 nodes are delivering.
